name: Destination Asset Weight is Medium
notes: Adjusts the relevance of events and flows if the destination asset weight is medium.
conditions_text: when the destination asset has a weight less than 7
when the destination asset has a weight greater than 3
TD_list: APPLY Destination Asset Weight is Medium on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the destination asset has a weight less than 7
AND when the destination asset has a weight greater than 3
